description: Human-reviewed RU-5 Primary, boundary-proven relation, grouping, supporting-context, and executed-budget truth.

cases.description: A fallback Primary is retained without fabricated supporting context.
Unrelated field-region and function Primaries form independent bundles.
A strong exact direct-call edge groups two changed Primaries.
A weak Primary edge does not group, while required degraded context blocks only its question.
Required lifecycle support fits and is selected.
Required support wins while an individually oversized helpful candidate is omitted.
A same-file distractor is rejected even with spare budget.
Long comment, string, and Unicode chunks land exactly on the token boundary.
An oversized Primary is retained but blocked without truncation.
Required support that cannot fit is omitted and blocks dispatch.
Multiple questions split bundles and a multi-atom Primary remains intact.
Base/head Primaries sharing one replacement atom derive exact correspondence and one group.
A strong exact same-file edge cannot manufacture a semantic group.
Multiple source, Primary, candidate, and edge input orders remain stable.
A required degraded relation is omitted with exact diagnostics and blocks dispatch.
Required context is repeated while helpful candidates first-fit into two bundles.
